description_long: This helmet features a robust, sci-fi inspired design with a predominantly white shell accented by bold blue stripes and markings. The front is dominated by a black, full-face visor that wraps around the eyes, providing a sleek, intimidating appearance. The surface is weathered, showing scratches, scuffs, and dirt, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. Blue vertical and horizontal stripes run from the front to the back, with additional blue detailing around the mouth and jaw area. The sides display circular, mechanical-looking components, possibly for communication or filtration, and the rear has two rectangular vent-like structures. The overall form is rounded and contoured to fit closely to the head, with reinforced areas for protection.
description: A white and blue, weathered sci-fi helmet with a full-face black visor, mechanical side details, and bold blue stripes running front to back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black visor, blue vertical stripe, and blue mouthpiece details, with visible weathering and scuffs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular mechanical component, blue jawline, and the wraparound visor, with visible surface scratches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue vertical stripe, two rectangular vent-like structures, and significant scuff marks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mechanical component, blue jawline, and visor edge, with additional surface wear.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Vertical grille vents at the mouth area and two rectangular vent-like structures at the rear; no other visible openings.
attribute_graphic_design: Bold blue vertical and horizontal stripes, blue mouth and jaw accents, and a series of blue tick marks above the visor; overall weathered and battle-worn style.
